<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->
- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	- Next.js 14 App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Prisma/Supabase, Hardhat/Solidity, wagmi/viem/Reown; dark mobile-first game UI.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	- Created the Next.js 14 App Router TypeScript/Tailwind foundation.

- [x] Customize the Project
	- Implemented the mobile-first dark USDm landing UI, health API route, Prisma schema, environment template, and Solidity/Hardhat scaffold.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	- No extensions required by the setup information.

- [x] Compile the Project
	- `npm run build` completes successfully.

- [x] Create and Run Task
	- Added and ran the `Build XOLAT` task.

- [x] Launch the Project
	- Development server started at `npm run dev` (http://localhost:3000).

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	- Environment template and workspace development instructions are present.

## Execution Guidelines
- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
